name: Hot Cocoa Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and stir until well mixed.
2. Transfer the mixture to a tightly covered container.
3. The mix yields approximately 3-3/4 cups (about fifteen 6-ounce servings).
4. For one serving: Place 1/4 cup of the mix in a heatproof cup or mug. Add 3/4 cup boiling water. Stir until blended. Serve hot and top with marshmallow if desired.
